case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES ET AL VS. SRJ DRYWALL, ET AL

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN B. KADEVARI OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. 1-510-337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk
